pages.raw_text:
The case Of Walter L. Andre
against the Northern Pacific company
is before a jury and Judge Morris
today. Andre Is suing to recover $4,000
damages for injuries he alleges he
sustained November last while In
the employ Of the company a. q la
borer. He claims that he was ORDER
ed to unload freight from a car. He
finished his work and In order to ret
out Of the car he was Obliged to
crawl over the freight around tho
door and leave the car by means OF
a ladder or horse. He alleges that
the ladder was rotten and when he
stepped on 1t II gave way. hurting him
to the ground and breaking his right
arm and otherwise bruising and shak-
ing him up. For these injuries and
the mental pain and anguish he asks
$4,000.
